notes: Fortunes — scans & mastery. The Fortunes tab now has a 🛰️ Sensor Office: when leads are scarce, buy a Sensor Scan (cheap) or Deep-Space Scan (pricier, stronger/rarer) to flush a fresh 📡 signal onto your scope on demand — agency over the hunt. And the Almanac now rewards collectors: catalogue every effect in a domain (Combat, Trade, Logistics, Science, Industry, Escort, Politics, Piracy) to earn a permanent 🏅 Mastery — a standing passive bonus (e.g. +8% weapon damage, −10% fuel, +15% research) plus a credit reward. The Almanac shows per-domain progress and mastery badges.
